title: Gorilla Glue Clear 110ml
features: ALL PURPOSE: Gorilla Glue Clear is highly versatile and easily bonds wood, stone, metal, ceramic, foam, class, concrete and more!
GORILLA TOUGH: With all the strength you've come to expect from Gorilla, Gorilla Glue Clear's incredibly strong formula provides a bond you can rely on.
WATER RESISTANT: Withstands moderate exposure to water, making it ideal for both indoor and outdoor applications.
CRYSTAL CLEAR: So clear it's virtually invisible. Ideal for hidden household fixes and building repairs.
FOAM FREE: Our non-expanding formula doesn't increase in size, making Gorilla Glue Clear easy to use and exactly where you need it.
description: From the manufacturer Gorilla Glue Clear Welcome to the virtually invisible glue that’s strong, versatile and clear. Because this is made by Gorilla, you know that it’s tough and easy to use. But where this glue is special is that it’s foam-free – it doesn’t expand as it dries – and is 100% crystal clear. Use Gorilla Glue Clear to bond all kinds of materials, even if they’re dissimilar, both indoors and outdoors. Crystal Clear Virtually invisible as you apply, virtually invisible as it dries. Gorilla Glue Clear is ideal for subtle bonds and hidden fixes. High Strength You may not see Gorilla Glue Clear, but it’s more than effective. This adhesive combines high strength with maximum durability. All-Purpose What good is a glue if it doesn’t bond nearly all materials? Gorilla Glue Clear does exactly that – even if the surfaces are different. Indoor / Outdoor Because not all jobs are indoors, this glue also works outdoors. Gorilla Glue Clear can be exposed to moderate amounts of water.
